info.title: Constellation MCP
info.description: Model Context Protocol endpoints for Constellation consulting delivery platform. Read endpoints at /mcp/* provide tenant-scoped access to projects, assignments, time entries, expenses, RAIDD, financials, and CRM data. Write endpoints at /mcp/v1/* (Phase 0 — Phases 0–5: clients, estimates, HubSpot linkage, Teams linkage) are gated by the MCP_WRITES_ENABLED feature flag and require an X-Idempotency-Key header.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile including role, tenant, and platform role. No special role required.
Returns project assignments for the authenticated user (or another user if the caller has manager-level permissions). Supports date range filtering.

parameters.name: assigneeId
parameters.description: User ID to retrieve assignments for. Defaults to the authenticated user. Requires manager role to view other users.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD). Returns assignments ending on or after this date.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD). Returns assignments starting on or before this date.

get.description: Returns time entries for the authenticated user (or another user if the caller has manager-level permissions). Supports date range and status filtering.

parameters.name: assigneeId
parameters.description: User ID to retrieve time entries for. Defaults to the authenticated user.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (e.g. Draft, Submitted, Approved).

get.description: Returns expense reports for the authenticated user (or another user if the caller has manager-level permissions). Supports status filtering.

parameters.name: submitterId
parameters.description: User ID to retrieve expense reports for. Defaults to the authenticated user.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (e.g. Draft, Submitted, Approved).

get.description: Returns projects in the user's tenant. Supports search by name/code/client, client filtering, and budget health filtering. Requires PM, Admin, Portfolio Manager, or Executive role.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by project name, code, or client name.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Filter by client ID.

parameters.name: health
parameters.description: Filter by budget health status.

get.description: Returns detailed information for a specific project including budget vs actual. Requires PM, Admin, Portfolio Manager, or Executive role.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project ID.

404.description: Project not found or not in user's tenant

get.description: Returns deliverables for a project with optional status filtering. Requires PM, Admin, Portfolio Manager, or Executive role.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project ID.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by deliverable status.

get.description: Returns Risks, Actions, Issues, Dependencies, and Decisions for a project. Supports filtering by type, status, and priority. Requires PM, Admin, Portfolio Manager, or Executive role.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project ID.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by RAIDD type (e.g. Risk, Action, Issue, Dependency, Decision).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (e.g. Open, Closed, Mitigated).

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Filter by priority (e.g. Critical, High, Medium, Low).

get.summary: Get aggregated status report data for a project
get.description: Returns aggregated project data suitable for generating or summarizing a status report: hours worked, expenses, team breakdown, RAIDD summary, milestones, deliverables, and resource allocations. Defaults to the last 14 days. Requires PM, Admin, Portfolio Manager, or Executive role.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project ID.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Period start date (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 14 days ago.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Period end date (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

get.description: Returns Teams and Planner integration info for a project. Requires PM, Admin, Portfolio Manager, or Executive role.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The project ID.

get.summary: Get portfolio RAIDD across all projects
get.description: Aggregates RAIDD entries across all projects in the user's tenant. Supports filtering by type, status, and priority. Requires Portfolio Manager, Admin, or Executive role.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by RAIDD type (e.g. Risk, Action, Issue, Dependency, Decision).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (e.g. Open, Closed, Mitigated).

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Filter by priority (e.g. Critical, High, Medium, Low).

200.description: Aggregated RAIDD entries with project context

get.description: Returns a timeline view of all projects in the user's tenant with start/end dates and status. Supports client and date filtering. Requires Portfolio Manager, Admin, or Executive role.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Filter by client ID.

parameters.name: endingBefore
parameters.description: Only show projects ending before this date (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD).

get.description: Returns invoice batches for the user's tenant. Supports date range and client filtering. Requires Billing Admin, Admin, or Executive role.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Filter by client ID.

get.description: Aggregates invoice data by Month, Quarter, Client, or Project. Returns total amounts and counts. Requires Billing Admin, Admin, or Executive role.

parameters.name: groupBy
parameters.description: Group results by dimension. Defaults to Month.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD).

get.description: Returns HubSpot deals for the user's tenant. Supports search and stage filtering. Requires PM, Admin, or Executive role. Returns empty if HubSpot is not connected.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by deal name or description.

parameters.name: stage
parameters.description: Filter by deal stage.

get.summary: Get projects linked to a CRM deal
get.description: Returns Constellation projects linked to a specific HubSpot deal. Requires PM, Admin, or Executive role.

parameters.name: dealId
parameters.description: The HubSpot deal ID.

get.description: Returns all estimates for the tenant. Supports filtering by status, client, project, estimate type, and text search. Requires PM, Admin, Portfolio Manager, Executive, or Billing Admin role.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by estimate name or client name.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: draft, final, approved, rejected.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Filter by client ID.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Filter by project ID.

parameters.name: estimateType
parameters.description: Filter by estimate type: detailed, block, retainer, program.

parameters.name: includeArchived
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to include archived estimates. Defaults to false.

200.description: List of estimates with summary fields

get.description: Returns full estimate detail including structure (epics, stages) and payment milestones. Requires PM, Admin, Portfolio Manager, Executive, or Billing Admin role.

parameters.name: estimateId
parameters.description: The estimate ID.

200.description: Estimate detail with structure and milestones

get.description: Returns the detailed line item breakdown for an estimate — hours, rates, costs, roles, and margin per line. Supports filtering by epic or stage. Includes a summary with totals. Requires PM, Admin, Portfolio Manager, Executive, or Billing Admin role.

parameters.name: estimateId
parameters.description: The estimate ID.

parameters.name: epicId
parameters.description: Filter line items by epic ID.

parameters.name: stageId
parameters.description: Filter line items by stage ID.

200.description: List of line items with summary totals

get.description: Returns individual expense items (not grouped into reports). Supports filtering by person, project, date range, approval status, category, and billable flag. Includes a summary with totals broken down by category.

parameters.name: personId
parameters.description: User ID to retrieve expenses for. Defaults to the authenticated user. Requires manager role to view other users.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Filter by project ID.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by approval status: draft, submitted, approved, rejected, reimbursed.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by category: travel, hotel, meals, taxi, airfare, parking, entertainment, mileage, perdiem.

parameters.name: billable
parameters.description: Filter by billable status: 'true' or 'false'.

200.description: List of expense items with summary

get.description: Returns reimbursement batches. Regular users see only their own batches. Managers/admins can view all. Supports filtering by status, date range, and user.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: pending, under_review, processed.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date filter (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter by user ID (manager role required to view other users).

get.description: Returns full detail for a reimbursement batch including all line items with their associated expense data. Regular users can only view their own batches.

parameters.name: batchId
parameters.description: The reimbursement batch ID.

200.description: Reimbursement batch detail with line items

get.description: Returns clients in the caller's tenant, filtered by optional case-insensitive name/shortName substring. Each result includes linkage signals (hasHubspotLink, hasTeamsLink, activeEstimateCount) so the Copilot agent can branch on whether the client is already wired up to HubSpot or Teams, and whether any active estimates exist.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring match on client name or shortName.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results to return (1-100, default 25).

post.description: Round-trips a JSON body through the MCP write middleware (feature flag, idempotency, audit). Use to verify the connector is wired up for writes. Supports ?dryRun=true. Requires X-Idempotency-Key header.

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-supplied UUID or opaque token. Replays with the same key return the cached response.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: If true, the endpoint validates and returns the would-be response but does NOT write to the audit log.

post.description: Creates a client in the caller's tenant. Performs a near-match scan against existing client names first — if any similar client is found, returns 409 with candidate records unless force=true is set in the body. Supports ?dryRun=true for conversational preview. Requires admin, pm, or portfolio-manager role.

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-supplied UUID or opaque token. Replays with the same key return the cached response.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: If true, validates and returns the would-be client plus near-matches, but does not write to the database.

shortName.description: Abbreviated name for display (e.g. 'MSFT' for Microsoft).

force.description: If true, bypasses near-match duplicate detection. Use only after confirming with the end user.

409.description: Near-match to existing client — confirm with user and retry with force=true

post.description: Calls the AI service with the provided narrative and tenant rate catalog to generate a hierarchical estimate with up to 8 summary line items. Performs a duplicate-active-estimate check on the client (409 unless force=true). Supports ?dryRun=true for conversational preview. Requires admin, pm, or portfolio-manager role.

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-supplied UUID or opaque token. Replays with the same key return the cached response.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: If true, validates and returns the would-be response but does NOT persist or audit.

clientName.description: Override for the client name sent to the AI

409.description: Active estimate(s) already exist for the client (duplicates returned in existingEstimates)

post.description: Creates a single-line-item estimate using the resolved billing rate for the named role from the tenant rate catalog. Suitable for quick T&M engagements. Supports ?dryRun=true. Requires admin, pm, or portfolio-manager role.

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-supplied UUID or opaque token. Replays with the same key return the cached response.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: If true, validates and returns the would-be response but does NOT persist or audit.

roleName.description: Role name from the tenant rate catalog

409.description: Active estimate(s) already exist for the client

post.summary: Create fixed-price estimate (one line per phase)
post.description: Creates a fixed-price estimate with one epic per phase. Each phase has a name and a fixed fee amount; hours are set to 1 and rate equals the phase price. Supports ?dryRun=true. Requires admin, pm, or portfolio-manager role.

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-supplied UUID or opaque token. Replays with the same key return the cached response.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: If true, validates and returns the would-be response but does NOT persist or audit.

409.description: Active estimate(s) already exist for the client

get.description: Searches the connected HubSpot CRM for companies or deals matching the query. Returns up to 20 results. Requires HubSpot to be connected in tenant settings. Requires admin, pm, or portfolio-manager role.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Object type to search: company or deal

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search string

424.description: HubSpot not connected for this tenant

post.summary: Link SCDP client to a HubSpot company or deal
post.description: Writes a crm_object_mappings row linking the client to a HubSpot object. If createIfMissing=true and no hubspotObjectId is provided, creates the HubSpot company or deal first. Supports ?dryRun=true. Requires admin, pm, or portfolio-manager role.

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-supplied UUID or opaque token. Replays with the same key return the cached response.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: If true, validates and returns the would-be response but does NOT persist or audit.

createIfMissing.description: Create a new HubSpot record if no ID given

424.description: HubSpot not connected for this tenant

post.summary: Link SCDP client to a Microsoft Teams team
post.description: Ensures a client_teams row exists. If createIfMissing=true and no teamId is provided, creates a new Microsoft Teams team via the Graph API. Returns alreadyLinked=true if the client was already linked. Supports ?dryRun=true. Requires admin, pm, or portfolio-manager role.

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-supplied UUID or opaque token. Replays with the same key return the cached response.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: If true, validates and returns the would-be response but does NOT persist or audit.

createIfMissing.description: Create a new team if teamId is not provided

post.summary: Create a Microsoft Teams channel for a project
post.description: Creates a channel in the Teams team associated with the project's client (resolved via client_teams) or the provided teamId. Writes a project_channels row. Returns alreadyLinked=true if the project already has a channel. Partial-failure envelope: warnings[] is populated if non-critical errors occurred. Supports ?dryRun=true. Requires admin, pm, or portfolio-manager role.

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-supplied UUID or opaque token. Replays with the same key return the cached response.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: If true, validates and returns the would-be response but does NOT persist or audit.

scopes.api://198aa0a6-d2ed-4f35-b41b-b6f6778a30: Access Constellation MCP as signed-in user
